sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50613" key="i)oto/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰο-τόκος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, </foreign>(<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἰός</foreign> B) <sense id="n50613.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">poison-bearing, venomous</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.73</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
